title: Decline
description:
There's No Turning Back.What does it feel like to descend into madness? Why does everything feel so unsafe... yet strangely familiar?

You accepted a night shift at an abandoned underground drainage facility. What seemed like a routine job quickly becomes a descent into madness. You are not alone. Every corner hides something that should not exist, and the deeper you go, the harder it becomes to tell reality apart from whatever is trying to break your mind.

THEY see you.Every shift changes the rules. Inspired by the golden era of indie horror games, Decline takes a familiar foundation and turns it into something unpredictable. Just when you think you've learned how to survive... you'll discover you're no longer playing the same game. Every tool can save your life... until it can't. Manage your resources, listen carefully, react under pressure, and adapt as fear evolves alongside you.

LOOK BEYOND THE SURFACE.This doesn't end when the sun rises. Between each night, you'll awaken in fragmented memories and liminal spaces where reality begins to unravel. Discover hidden secrets, easter eggs, fan theories, multiple endings, and a story that rewards those willing to look where no one else dares... You may piece everything together—or lose yourself trying.

The nightmare you know isn't the one that ends the story.

So keep your flashlight on... and stay up till dawn.
description_short: Nothing stays safe. Every shift changes the rules, every sound could be your last warning, and every mistake brings you closer to what awaits you in the darkness. What protects you today may not protect you tomorrow. Descend into an abandoned underground drainage facility... and survive the descent.
